# components { #app.components }

`components`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [audio](#app.components.audio) | Audio player for bird sounds and spectrograms. |
| [email](#app.components.email) | Open an external email to the BAM team. |
| [footer](#app.components.footer) | Footer with copyright and license information. |
| [report_issue](#app.components.report_issue) | Link to the GitHub issues page for reporting issues. |
| [website](#app.components.website) | Link to the BAM website. |
| [website_contact](#app.components.website_contact) | Link to the BAM website contact page. |

### audio { #app.components.audio }

```python
components.audio()
```

Audio player for bird sounds and spectrograms.

### email { #app.components.email }

```python
components.email()
```

Open an external email to the BAM team.

### footer { #app.components.footer }

```python
components.footer()
```

Footer with copyright and license information.

### report_issue { #app.components.report_issue }

```python
components.report_issue()
```

Link to the GitHub issues page for reporting issues.

### website { #app.components.website }

```python
components.website()
```

Link to the BAM website.

### website_contact { #app.components.website_contact }

```python
components.website_contact()
```

Link to the BAM website contact page.
